backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining types (ContentType, ContentSection, PrintableGuide, Technician) and query/update functions for managing pest control educational content, printable guides, and technician directory with zip-based search.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the removal of a bottom navigation icon from the bottom-right corner, listing affected frontend files and components with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Pre-existing summaries of frontend source files covering the main app structure, educational content components, pest-specific content, photo scanner, quiz, and various utility hooks.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color palette for light and dark modes, defining design tokens for backgrounds, borders, accents, and sidebar components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with viewport meta tag, app title, root div, and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component wrapping the app with ErrorBoundary and QueryClientProvider, conditionally rendering QrCodePage or main educational content based on hash routing.
frontend/src/components/BottomNavigation: Empty component file with no content (likely removed as part of the bottom navigation icon removal feature).
frontend/src/components/EducationalConte: Main content component with seven-tab navigation (scanner, identify, habitats, prevention, treatment, guides, findLocalHelp) synchronized with hash routing, displaying pest selection buttons for 18 different pests and rendering corresponding educational sections.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React error boundary class component that catches render errors and displays a fallback UI with error details and a reset button to return to the main app.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying copyright notice, caffeine.ai attribution with heart icon, and educational disclaimer text.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header component with app branding (bug icon and title) and a Share button that opens the ShareQrCodeDialog for app distribution.
frontend/src/components/pests/ArmyAntsCo: Informational component providing detailed content about army ants including identification, physical characteristics, species distribution, habitats, behavior patterns, and safety warnings. Organized into multiple card sections with icons.
frontend/src/components/pests/BeetlesCon: Educational component describing common household beetles with sections on identification, species types (carpet beetles, flour beetles, etc.), infestation signs, entry points, and attractants. Uses card-based layout with icons.
frontend/src/components/pests/BlackAntsC: Informational component covering black ant identification, common species (little black ant, pavement ant), nesting locations, and attractants. Includes safety notice and structured content in card components with icons.
frontend/src/components/pests/BlackStink: React component providing detailed information about black stink bugs, including identification, physical characteristics, entry behavior, hiding spots, and prevention methods. Uses shadcn/ui Card and Alert components with lucide-react icons.
frontend/src/components/pests/CarpenterA: React component detailing carpenter ant identification, infestation signs (frass, rustling sounds), structural damage warnings, and prevention strategies. Includes destructive alerts for structural damage and safety notices about bites.
frontend/src/components/pests/Cockroache: React component covering cockroach identification, common species (German, American, Oriental, Brown-Banded), infestation signs, habitats, and control methods. Includes safety notices about pesticide use.
frontend/src/components/pests/CommonHous: React component describing house fly identification, life cycle, breeding sources, attractants, and prevention measures. Emphasizes disease transmission risks and sanitation practices.
frontend/src/components/pests/EarwigsCon: React component explaining earwig identification (distinctive pincers), behavior patterns (nocturnal), habitats, and control methods. Notes they are generally harmless nuisance pests.
frontend/src/components/pests/HeadLiceCo: React component displaying comprehensive information about head lice including identification, signs, checking methods, transmission, and prevention. Uses shadcn/ui Card and Alert components with Lucide icons.
frontend/src/components/pests/LargeFlies: React component providing detailed information about large fly species (blow flies, flesh flies, cluster flies, horse/deer flies) including identification, signs of infestation, and characteristics. Uses shadcn/ui Card and Alert components.
frontend/src/components/pests/MiceConten: React component covering mouse identification, signs of infestation, physical characteristics, nesting materials, habitats, and entry points. Includes health and safety warnings using shadcn/ui components.
frontend/src/components/pests/MothsLarva: React component detailing moth and larvae identification, including clothes moths and pantry moths, their signs of infestation, common locations, and attractants. Uses shadcn/ui Card and Alert components.
frontend/src/components/pests/RedAntsCon: React component providing information about red ants (especially fire ants) including physical characteristics, species types, signs of presence, nesting locations, and safety warnings about stings. Uses shadcn/ui components with destructive alert variant.
frontend/src/components/pests/ScorpionsC: Displays comprehensive information about scorpions including identification, physical characteristics, common species, habitats, behavior patterns, and safety warnings about their potentially dangerous stings.
frontend/src/components/pests/SpidersCon: Provides detailed spider identification guide covering physical characteristics, common indoor species, signs of presence, and specific information about venomous species like black widow spiders with safety warnings.
frontend/src/components/pests/TicksConte: Educational content about ticks including their life cycle, feeding behavior, physical characteristics, activity patterns, outdoor environments where they're found, and health warnings about disease transmission.
frontend/src/components/pests/WoodBeetle: Describes wood-boring beetles with identification details for different species, signs of infestation (exit holes, frass, tunnels), typical indoor locations, and warnings about structural damage they can cause.
frontend/src/components/PhotoScanner.tsx: Main photo scanning component that integrates camera capture, file upload, image editing (rotation, crop, zoom, enhance), and saved scans management with tagging functionality.
Displays and allows downloading of PDF guides filtered by content type, showing loading states and empty states when no guides are available.
frontend/src/components/QrCodePage.tsx: Full-page QR code sharing interface that generates a QR code for the app URL and provides copy-to-clipboard and download functionality with error handling.
frontend/src/components/SavedScansGaller: Gallery view for saved scans with tag filtering, reordering, deletion with confirmation dialog, and displays scan metadata including timestamps and tags.
frontend/src/components/SavedScanTagsEdi: Tag editor component for saved scans that supports adding, removing, and inline editing of tags with keyboard shortcuts.
frontend/src/components/sections/Habitat: Explains bed bug habitats, common hiding spots (mattresses, furniture, walls), feeding behavior patterns, reproduction lifecycle, and includes visual aids with images of typical infestation locations.
frontend/src/components/sections/HeatTre: Alert dialog component that displays critical safety warnings before heat treatment, including removal of firearms/ammunition, furniture disposal guidance, and occupancy restrictions during treatment.
frontend/src/components/sections/Identif: React component displaying educational content about identifying bed bugs, including cards for adult bed bugs, life stages, bite marks, and signs of infestation with images and detailed descriptions.
frontend/src/components/sections/Prevent: React component providing prevention strategies for bed bugs, featuring cards on travel precautions and used furniture inspection with images and detailed safety guidelines.
frontend/src/components/sections/Treatme: React component for heat treatment guidance with interactive checklists (before/during/after phases), progress tracking, and a reminder dialog system for treatment preparation.
frontend/src/components/ShareQrCodeDialo: Modal dialog for sharing the app via QR code with copy link and download QR code functionality, plus option to open full-page QR view.
frontend/src/components/TechnicianFinder: React component for searching pest control technicians by zip code with validation, displaying results in cards, and toggling a map view. Uses custom hooks for data fetching and includes error handling and loading states.
frontend/src/components/TechnicianMap.ts: React component that renders an interactive Google Maps interface displaying technician locations as markers with info windows containing business details. Manages map instance, markers, and bounds calculation using the Google Maps JavaScript API.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook managing Internet Computer actor creation with authentication, using React Query to cache actors and invalidate dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGoogleMaps.ts: Custom React hook that loads the Google Maps JavaScript API script with Places library, managing loading state and errors with singleton pattern to prevent duplicate script loads.
frontend/src/hooks/useHashRoute.ts: Custom React hook implementing hash-based client-side routing with hash normalization, navigation helpers, and route matching without external router dependencies.
frontend/src/hooks/useHeatTreatmentCheck: Custom React hook managing heat treatment checklist item completion state with localStorage persistence, providing toggle, reset, and completion statistics functionality.
Custom React hook managing a one-time reminder dialog state for heat treatment checklist with localStorage persistence to track user confirmation.
frontend/src/hooks/useImageEditor.ts: Custom React hook for image editing operations (rotation, zoom, enhancement) with async processing, export to Blob, and reset functionality.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation.
frontend/src/hooks/useNextRoute.ts: Hook that determines the next logical navigation destination based on current hash route, defining a flow through educational tabs (scanner → identify → habitats → prevention → treatment → guides → findLocalHelp).
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching printable guides (by content type, all, or by ID) and technicians by zip code from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSavedScans.ts: Hook for managing saved pest scans in localStorage with CRUD operations, tagging support, reordering, and persistence availability detection.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a warm educational color palette for light and dark modes, plus utility classes for checklist styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/types/google-maps.d.ts: TypeScript type declarations for Google Maps JavaScript API including Map, Marker, InfoWindow, LatLng, and LatLngBounds classes.
frontend/src/utils/assert.ts: Type-safe assertion utilities including invariant checks, exhaustive switch helpers, and defined value guards.
frontend/src/utils/clipboard.ts: Safe clipboard copy utility with modern API and fallback support, returning structured success/failure results.
frontend/src/utils/imageProcessing.ts: Provides canvas-based image manipulation functions including rotation, contrast/brightness enhancement, zoom with centered scaling, and cropping. All functions accept and return data URLs as promises.
frontend/src/utils/qr.ts: Utilities for generating QR code image URLs via an external API and downloading them as PNG files. Returns structured results with user-friendly error messages.
frontend/src/utils/safeStorage.ts: Safe localStorage wrapper that catches quota and disabled errors, providing non-throwing get/set/remove operations with availability detection. All operations return structured results.
frontend/src/utils/shareUrl.ts: Utility functions to compute shareable app URLs, returning either the origin alone or the full URL including hash.
frontend/src/utils/useOnUnmount.ts: React hook that safely runs cleanup logic on component unmount, handling both synchronous and asynchronous cleanup functions. Used for stopping camera streams.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color system, extended theme tokens for UI components (sidebar, card, popover, etc.), custom animations, and typography/container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking one existing feature (removing bottom navigation icon) and one pending feature request (AR-1: remove find local help icon).
